programme.title: Outside: Beyond the Lens
programme.desc: Jeff is invited inside the rarely-seen operations of the 144th Fighter Wing base in Fresno.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: An expectant father receives a life-threatening diagnosis; Trixie assists a female wrestler after a headlock goes wrong; Dr. Turner learns shocking news that implicates the future of the maternity house.

programme.title: The Forsytes on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Soames commissions a country house despite Irene's distress; as Louisa faces a fresh start, Jo decides his future; Ann reveals a dark secret.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: In Paris high society, Edmond meddles in the lives of those he wishes to destroy; Edmond struggles to conceal his identity from Mercedes.

programme.title: The Puzzle Lady
programme.desc: Sherry becomes concerned when her ex-husband, rock star Dennis Pride, comes to Bakerbury.

programme.title: Murder in the Mountains
programme.desc: The death of the owner of an unusual new business venture in Kitzbuhel reveals relationship secrets.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: When tragedy strikes a local family, Dr. Turner's treatment comes under scrutiny; Trixie worries about the future of midwifery in Britain.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small: Seasons of the Dales
programme.desc: Revisiting picturesque scenes from the series in the Yorkshire countryside.

programme.title: Magic Moments -- The Best of '50s Pop (My Music Presents)
programme.desc: Phyllis McGuire, Pat Boone and Nick Clooney host a trip back to the 1950s with a mix of live performance and archival footage featuring classic moments from artists such as Perry Como, Debbie Reynolds and the McGuire Sisters.

programme.sub-title: Jodi's First Day at School; Daniel Plays at Jodi's House

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay use a checklist to guide them through their tasks; Jay creates his first comic book and learns about the importance of page order.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo tries to win a race without eating his sandwich, but learns that eating healthy food will give him energy; Cookie Monster tries to eat the sandwich for himself.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: The Great Splendito; The Bike Wash
programme.desc: The search for Mr. Splendito tickets is on; the Wombats power-clean a bunch of bikes.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.sub-title: The Yodel Birds Are Coming; A Lot of Hot!
programme.desc: The pals want to hear the Yodel Birds sing, but they must build them a rest nest first; Donkey and Duck Duck want to cool everyone off with lemonade.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: The Great Robot Picnic; Rosie's Car Wash
programme.desc: Rosie and Javi make flowerpots using repurposed items for the Robot Picnic; Rosie and Javi open a car wash to clean Iggy's ride-on car.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.desc: The kids learn the best way to slide down a hill; Ari and his friends learn the importance of oral health after Ari forgets to brush his teeth.

programme.title: Alma's Way

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.sub-title: Molly of Idaho; Cinder Cones and Broken Drones
programme.desc: Molly and Stormee try to retrieve Grandpa Nat's microphone; Molly and Stormee encounter a rattlesnake.

programme.sub-title: I Am Ravi Shankar; I Am Babe Didrikson Zaharias

programme.title: Lucy Worsley's Royal Myths & Secrets
programme.sub-title: Kings George III and IV & the Napoleonic War
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley digs behind the facade of Georgian elegance to reveal the fibs that helped conceal a darker side to the Regency and suppressed rebellion in an age of revolution.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the author of a book that sparked a nationwide treasure hunt is found dead, Barnaby must unravel clues to find the killer among a group of dedicated seekers.

programme.title: Samantha Brown's Places to Love
programme.desc: Exploring Arizona's Route 66; the Petrified Forest; Jack Rabbit Trading Post; Winslow's historic La Posada; Kingman's Route 66 Museum.

programme.title: BBC News The Context
programme.desc: A regular panel of guests from across the political spectrum discuss the biggest international stories of the day.

programme.title: BBC News America
programme.desc: Live news program produced out of BBC's Washington, D.C. bureau; host Sumi Somaskanda.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: Wild Foods
programme.desc: Members of the Cree Nation reintroduce the American buffalo; a new breed of cattle ranchers on Montana's high plains; conservationists in the Centennial Valley work to restore the Arctic grayling.

programme.title: Samantha Brown's Places to Love
programme.desc: The tiny railroad town of Goffs in the eastern Mojave Desert; Amboy; the only piece of Route 66 that runs through a military installation; Elmer's Bottle Tree Ranch.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An Andrew Clemens sand bottle circa 1885; a 1933 Goudey baseball card set 239/240; a Joan Miró pencil on paper circa 1965.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.sub-title: The Times That Try Men's Souls
programme.desc: British General Howe defeats General Washington, forcing the Americans to abandon New York; Washington's army regroups in New Jersey before attacking an outpost at Trenton.

programme.title: Roadtrip Nation: The Inside Scholars
programme.desc: Three formerly incarcerated folks explore higher education outside of prison.

programme.title: Roadtrip Nation: The Inside Scholars
programme.desc: The classroom inside prison where educators equip scholars with the resources to define their own paths; the roadtrippers reflect on their own journeys and learn what it takes to set themselves free.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: 50 Years With Peter, Paul and Mary
programme.desc: Performance footage of folk group Peter, Paul and Mary.

programme.title: This Land Is Your Land (My Music Presents)
programme.desc: The Smothers Brothers and Judy Collins host a look at the evolution of modern American folk music; performers include Glenn Yarborough, the Highwaymen, the Kingston Trio and the Limeliters.

programme.title: Rick Steves Mighty Alps
programme.desc: Rick Steves takes a European alpine adventure from Italy to Austria and Switzerland to France; locations include the Dolomites, Zugspitze, Matterhorn, Aiguille du Midi and the Tour du Mont Blanc hiking path.

programme.sub-title: Lyla Gets a Grip; Rappin' Riddles

programme.title: In the Americas With David Yetman
programme.sub-title: Imperiled Refuges: Islets in the Sea of Cortes

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
